failure.error_msg: Error: Seconds did not reset to 0 after reaching 59. assert 59 == 0 + where 59 = int(LogicArray('111011', Range(5, 'downto', 0))) + where LogicArray('111011', Range(5, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(dig_stopwatch.seconds).value + where LogicArrayObject(dig_stopwatch.seconds) = HierarchyObject(dig_stopwatch).seconds
